ValidationRule.description: It is used to validate that if transaction type is Purchase, then Supplier and Unit cost is reqired.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISNEW() && ISPICKVAL( Transaction_Type__c , "Purchase") && OR(ISBLANK( Supplier__c ) ,ISBLANK( Unit_Cost__c ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: When the transaction type is Purchase, the both Supplier and Unit Cost is required
